citations.quote: The accommodation support service can: ... Provide a landlord reference within 5 working days when you email us at accommodation@napier.ac.uk

findings.text: The brochure describes the accommodation support service and provides contact email accommodation@napier.ac.uk.
Source NAP-SRC-0014 is a general brochure and does not contain any records of Anfal's contact with the accommodation support service.

proposed_tasks.instructions: Search internal email archives, casenote systems, or CRM logs for any communication from Anfal to accommodation@napier.ac.uk or privateaccommodation@napier.ac.uk. Also search for any records of Anfal contacting ENSA Advice or using the accommodation support service. Report any findings or confirm absence.
proposed_tasks.title: Search internal records for Anfal's contact with accommodation support service

summary: Reviewed source NAP-SRC-0014 (Private Accommodation Brochure 2025). The brochure describes the accommodation support service but contains no records of Anfal's contact. No internal emails, casenotes, or logs are present in this source. A follow-up task is proposed to search for internal records.

uncertainties.text: No internal emails, casenotes, or logs are present in the provided source; Anfal's contact history is unknown.
